title: Add field-level proposal delta rows
summary: Extend proposal apply preview with field-level delta rows that compare proposal metadata against current native truth for coverage, snapshot, evidence, and source context.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal apply preview exposes concrete field-level delta rows instead of only aggregate delta summaries.
Each row compares proposal-facing value with current native truth and marks the result as aligned, review, or gap.
The rows stay read-only and only claim fields that can be derived from current native import plus proposal metadata.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal apply preview now renders a field-level delta section for coverage, snapshot truth, evidence linkage, and source path instead of stopping at an aggregate posture summary.
Each field row compares proposal-facing metadata against the current native compare surface and labels the result as aligned, review, or gap without inventing a repository patch.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the field-level proposal delta slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0027: expand current delta summary into explicit field-level deltas between proposal metadata and current native scope truth.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep field-level deltas scoped to values that are already derivable from current native import and proposal metadata.
Prefer readable compare rows over inventing a fake repository patch model.
